# Version 3.119.1
> **3.119.1 servicing release** · Released September 12, 2025 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.1)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.1/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.1.2/index.md)

## Highlights

A focused servicing release with Metal disposal fixes, iOS 15 hotfix, zlib refresh and the new PostScriptName API.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## API Surface

- **SKTypeface.PostScriptName** — Exposes the PostScript name of a typeface, matching the SkTypeface upstream API. — ❤️ [@jonlipsky](https://github.com/jonlipsky) ([#3263](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3263))

## Bug Fixes

- **Metal backend stability** — Disposing GRContext no longer crashes on the Metal backend, and a hotfix restores rendering on iOS 15 and lower. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid), [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) ([#3258](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3258), [#3293](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3293))
- **UTC DateTime and Mac Catalyst opacity** — Fixes an incorrect UTC DateTime conversion in the metadata helpers and stops SKXamlCanvas being forced opaque on Mac Catalyst. — ❤️ [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid), [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) ([#3333](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3333), [#3236](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3236))

## Platform

- **WinUI native build hardening** — Builds the WinUI interop as /MT and rebuilds EGL as win32 and GLESv2 as WASDK for compatibility with modern Windows App SDK consumers. ([#3341](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3341), [#3338](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3338))

## Security

- **zlib refreshed to 1.3.0.1+** — Updates the bundled zlib to 1.3.0.1+ to pick up upstream fixes. ([#3058](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3058))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.2

No HarfBuzzSharp binding changes shipped in this release — it rebuilds the same HarfBuzz as the previous line.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@jeremy-visionaid](https://github.com/jeremy-visionaid) | Avoided initializing SKMetalView twice, added the GRContext disposal test on Metal, and fixed the UTC DateTime conversion ([#3256](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3256), [#3258](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3258), [#3333](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3333)) |
| [@taublast](https://github.com/taublast) | Hotfixed Metal on iOS 15 and lower and prevented SKAutoCanvasRestore from crashing when the canvas was already disposed ([#3291](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3291), [#3293](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3293)) |
| [@jonlipsky](https://github.com/jonlipsky) | Added SKTypeface.PostScriptName ([#3263](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3263)) |
| [@pjcollins](https://github.com/pjcollins) | Added CI triggers for the primary branches to azure-pipelines-native ([#3248](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3248)) |
| [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) | Fixed SKXamlCanvas being forced opaque on Mac Catalyst ([#3236](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3236)) |

## Preview 1 (September 4, 2025)

Preview 1 collected the Metal disposal fixes, the iOS 15 hotfix, the PostScriptName API, the zlib refresh and the WinUI native build hardening.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.0...v3.119.1-preview.1.1)
